message:
test(e2e): add integration test for accepted-envelope clock regression guard

Validate that a sender whose clock regresses (sent_at_ms goes backward)
does not have its session falsely pruned as stale. The test:
- Sends seq 1 at t=100, seq 2 at t=90 (regressed clock)
- Verifies agent-reg-a remains live (last_seen clamped to 100)
- Confirms agent-reg-b at t=149 is capacity-rejected (not stale-evicting
  agent-reg-a, since 149 - 100 = 49 < stale threshold of 50)
- Asserts rejected sender metadata does not persist in storage

Companion integration test for the wire_protocol max()-based timestamp
regression fix in dd7767f9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
